// status_history_note: spec_ready → architecture_ready → plan_ready → qa_ready → implementation_in_progress (T1 partial → T1.5 spike → T1.5 cleanup → T2 main) → implemented 2026-05-17T15:30Z (28 tasks done; T028 manual smoke gate pending; 508/508 tests green; build clean)

values: Redirect Manager PRD-003: Wire placeholder 'Publish all' hero CTA on Full Page workspace to a real Sitecore publish job. Rename 'Publish all' → 'Publish Site' (Republish mode, all configured locales, confirmation dialog, fire-and-forget toast). Add per-map 'Publish' action in Redirect Maps rail (item-only Republish, no confirmation, fire-and-forget toast). Target endpoint: SitecoreAI Publishing v1 POST /authoring/publishing/v1/jobs (operator-supplied spec). Tranche 1 probes @sitecore-marketplace-sdk/xmc for a publishing wrapper; if absent (operator's initial finding), add new Next.js API route at app/api/publish/route.ts holding OAuth client-credentials, proxying to REST endpoint. Operator pre-approved REST fallback. Full Page surface only — Context Panel + Dashboard Widget unchanged.

stage_history.notes: Light rigor, single focused cluster (4 questions via AskUserQuestion): site publish scope, per-map publish scope, UX (confirmation + async), surfaces. Operator answers: Republish + subitems + all-langs; per-map item-only (no children/related); confirm Publish Site / no confirm per-map / fire-and-forget toast; Full Page only.

Operator confirmed recap + added technical anchor: SitecoreAI Publishing v1 POST /authoring/publishing/v1/jobs is the integration target (operator supplied the API spec). Pre-approved REST fallback if SDK has no wrapper. Tranche 1 probes SDK first.

PRD-003 written + light-rigor critical review (fresh PM subagent) returned 0 blockers + 2 concerns (folded as PRD edits). prd-minimal-003 written. ADR-0031 (deferred publish-surface decision) written + ADR README index updated.

Minimal track — no architecture blueprint file. 3 new ADRs: ADR-0032 (per-map Publish placement: icon button at row end, immediately right of RedirectType Badge, with stopPropagation to not trigger row selection), ADR-0033 (branch-agnostic publish service module contract at site/lib/publish/publish-service.ts — six surfaces: PublishScope union, pure body builders, CallPublish transport adapter, outcomeFrom mapper, ToastAdapter, idempotency via caller-side disabled state), ADR-0034 (Tranche 1 outcome template, Status=Proposed). SDK contract gate satisfied via xmc.sites.Site.languages citation at node_modules/@sitecore-marketplace-sdk/xmc/dist/xmc/src/client-sites/types.gen.d.ts line 1019 + double .data.data unwrap convention (carry-over from PRD-000/002 site/lib/sdk/sites.ts). Bonus side-finding: augmentation.gen.d.ts grep confirms NO publishing surface in xmc.* (only sites.listJobs / sites.retrieveJob exist, which are background jobs, not publishing) — Branch B is the expected Tranche 1 outcome; Tranche 1 is largely confirmation. ADR-density gate: 3 new ADRs (under 5-ADR HARD STOP).

Skipped per scope_dial.ui_variants=skip. No UI variants, no POC clickdummies. PRD-003 visual surface is a rename + a single new icon-button affordance, both of which re-use existing PRD-002 Blok primitives (Sonner toast, dialog shell, button variants) — no new visual direction needed.

28 tasks (T001–T028; T014A is Branch-A alternative). Tranche 1 (T001–T005, read-only probe + ADR-0034 flip) ends in HARD operator gate. Tranche 2 split into 4 groups: 2A branch-agnostic core (T006–T013, 8 tasks), 2B Branch-B transport adapter (T014–T018, 5 tasks; collapses to T014A for Branch A), 2C UI integration (T019–T025, 7 tasks), 2D docs + smoke (T026–T028, 3 tasks). All 7 § 4c subsections filled or explicit N/A (4c-4 N/A for variant proposals but reuse anchors + verbatim AC copy + lucide icon recommendation provided; 4c-7 N/A — greenfield extension to existing app). Risks flagged: server-side route inflection (R-1), OAuth credential prereq (R-2), react-virtuoso row recycling (R-6), stopPropagation discipline (R-5). Snapshot setting respected — no task_breakdown_pre_qa file.

Edited task breakdown in place. Added § 9 TDD contract (RED → GREEN → REFACTOR; Tranche 1 waived; vitest + jsdom + @testing-library/react confirmed; msw absent — vi.spyOn(globalThis, 'fetch') only). Added § 10 with 35 explicitly specified tests (8 body/outcome unit, 5 orchestration unit, 10 route+token unit, 3 locale unit, 14 component UI, 2 theme/a11y). Split 5 tasks with a/b suffixes (T012a/b, T013a/b, T018a/b, T020a/b, T024a/b) preserving stable IDs. Reordered § 5 Execution Order so all RED test tasks (T012a, T013a, T018a, T020a, T024a) appear before their implementation siblings. T014/T015 now depend on T018a. Added § 4c-8: verbatim const expected body fixtures for buildSitePublishBody + buildItemPublishBody (PRD AC-P1.4 / AC-P2.3), SDK fixture citation (types.gen.d.ts:1019), structural secret-isolation spec for NFR-P2 regression, jsdom-no-msw env note. task_breakdown_style: tdd. No separate qa-report.md per minimal-track + light-rigor; enriched task breakdown is the contract.

Tranche 1 (T001–T005) complete; implementation-runbook-20260516T194651Z.md written. T001 = D-T1.1 = Branch B CONFIRMED via grep of all *.gen.d.ts under @sitecore-marketplace-sdk/xmc — zero xmc.publishing.* surfaces; all `jobs` hits are sites/xmapp background jobs (excluded per ADR-0034 step 1); all `publish*` hits are page-state properties or the `Publishing` type. T002 type-shape captured (Sites.Site.languages?: Array<string> | null at types.gen.d.ts:1019; double .data.data unwrap from site/lib/sdk/sites.ts:35-39; example values in xx-YY format). T003 (Publishing host URL), T004 (locales:['*'] live probe), T005 (D-T1.3 OAuth credentials verification) — all marked OPERATOR ACTION REQUIRED in capture artifact. ADR-0034 partially amended: Status=Proposed (Tranche 1 partial — awaiting T002 values / T003 host / T004 shorthand verdict / D-T1.3 OAuth creds). Branch A struck. Branch B SELECTED with known specifics (route path site/app/api/publish/route.ts, OAuth scopes, env var names). Tranche 1 capture log table appended to ADR. No code under site/ written — Tranche 1 is read-only. HARD OPERATOR GATE pending.

m_publish.description: Operator-driven smoke on solo tenant: Publish Site happy + Cancel + per-map Publish happy + stopPropagation + idempotency + error path + theme parity + carry-forward CRUD sanity. Documented at site/docs/smoke-publish.md.
m_publish.evidence: Operator confirmation 2026-05-17: 'smoke pass commit and code-review' after running through the 8-test checklist. Both happy paths produced real jobs in SitecoreAI publishing list with source='Redirect Manager' and createdBy.type='Application'.

operator_attention.item: AC-P1.4 site-publish body uses enumerated locales by default (from xmc.sites.<site>.languages). `options.xmc.locales: ["*"]` is only used if Tranche 1 D-T1.2 confirms the API accepts it.

Operator pre-inspected @sitecore-marketplace-sdk/xmc and found no publishing wrapper; Branch B (server-side OAuth proxy + Next.js API route) is the pre-approved fallback. Tranche 1 probe confirms before commitment.

Theme parity (dark/light/system) and reduced-motion compliance patterns from PRD-002 carry forward to the new confirmation dialog + per-map publish button. Re-use existing Blok modal + toast components; no new design tokens.

First server-side route in Redirect Manager (Branch B only). ADR-0002 "no server-side OAuth proxy" stance is partially superseded if Branch B lands — successor ADR records the carve-out for publishing. Other Sitecore calls remain Mode A.

Fire-and-forget UX hides the eventual publish outcome. A 201 only confirms the job was QUEUED — not that it completed. Job-status polling explicitly deferred per scope-dial; operator is aware of the simple-PRD trade-off.

Per-map Publish placement is /architect's call — there is NO existing per-row action pattern in the rail (edit/delete live on the detail pane, not on rail rows). Architect picks from the three options enumerated in PRD § 11 (icon button / overflow menu / row-end action).
OQ-P1 — Does @sitecore-marketplace-sdk/xmc expose a publishing surface? Resolution: Tranche 1 .d.ts inspection. Operator's initial finding: no.
OQ-P2 — Is options.xmc.locales: ["*"] accepted by the API, or must locales be enumerated? Resolution: Tranche 1 live probe.
OQ-P3 — Canonical SitecoreAI Publishing host URL for the solo tenant. Resolution: Tranche 1 env discovery (likely in Cloud Portal developer settings).
OQ-P4 — Does xmc.sites.<site>.languages return locale list in the format required by the Publishing API (xx or xx-YY)? Resolution: Tranche 1 SDK type inspection.
OQ-P5 — Final placement of the per-map Publish action in the rail. Resolution: /architect picks from § 11 options.

OQ-P5 resolved: per-map Publish = icon button at row end, immediately right of the existing RedirectType Badge in RedirectMapList.tsx. onClick must call stopPropagation() to not also trigger row selection. Decision locked in ADR-0032.

Publish service module contract locked at site/lib/publish/publish-service.ts (ADR-0033) — branch-agnostic skeleton with six surfaces: PublishScope discriminated union, pure body builders (buildSitePublishBody / buildItemPublishBody), CallPublish transport adapter type (the ONLY thing that differs between Branch A and Branch B), outcomeFrom mapper, ToastAdapter (three states: requested/queued/failed), caller-side idempotency via disabled button state. Branch A vs Branch B differ in exactly one file — the adapter implementation.

ADR-0034 (Publish surface branch resolution) written as Proposed template. Tranche 1 of /implement strikes the losing branch + flips status to Accepted. Per-spec preservation of the deferral pattern from ADR-0031.

Strong evidence that Branch B (server-side OAuth proxy) is the Tranche 1 outcome: @sitecore-marketplace-sdk/xmc/dist/xmc/src/client-sites/augmentation.gen.d.ts grep reveals NO xmc.publishing.* surface — only xmc.sites.listJobs / xmc.sites.retrieveJob, which are background jobs (not publishing jobs). Tranche 1 D-T1.1 probe becomes confirmation rather than open question. Operator's pre-inspection corroborated.
operator_attention.references: ADR-0034 § Tranche 1 probe protocol; supersedes (partial) operator_attention 2026-05-16T19:46:51Z OQ-P1

Developer additive export of clearSitecoreAiTokenCache() from existing site/lib/auth/sitecoreai-token.ts (carried over from spike). Used by /api/publish/route.ts on 401 to evict the cached token before retrying. Behavior of existing token-acquisition code unchanged; only new export added.

Tranche 3 — Per-map publish REMOVED (operator finding during m_publish smoke 2026-05-17: Sitecore silently no-ops Items publish for Redirect Map items because they're not Edge-published content). US-P2 + FR-P3 + AC-P2.* removed from PRD-003. ADR-0032 (per-map placement) Status → Superseded by ADR-0036. Code: RedirectMapPublishButton.tsx + RedirectMapList.test.tsx deleted; RedirectMapList.tsx reverted to pre-Tranche-2; buildItemPublishBody removed; PublishScope collapsed to site-only.

Tranche 3 — Lightweight publish-job polling + cross-session resume added (ADR-0037). 3s polling interval via usePublishJobTracker; Tier 2 localStorage resume + Tier 3 name-prefix list scan via usePublishResume. Name format changed: 'Redirect Manager — <collection>/<site> — <iso>' (operator-readable + stable list-scan prefix). Two new GET routes restored from spike: /api/publish/jobs and /api/publish/jobs/[id]. Filter to source=Redirect Manager only (operator chose Option A — our app's jobs only).
